name: useful-loops
description: Autonomous iterative codebase improvement skills for gap analysis, test coverage, security audits, beta-readiness audits, service health audits, funnel audits, plan refinement, document refinement, plan-to-plan alignment, mockup generation, and prototype building. Designed to run standalone or in Ralph Loops.
